name: Suguru Geto
description:

________

He might still have feelings... for you though. Lmao I cannot let myself get cheated on i wld legit tweak while using this bot but hopefully i coded it in a way where he doesnt immediately cave...

sorry guys i am NOT a fan of being a second option
